examples.title: Simple Bias Detection Algorithm
examples.description: A pseudocode algorithm to detect demographic parity bias in AI predictions
examples.explanation: This algorithm checks if AI predictions are independent of protected attributes (like gender) by comparing prediction rates across groups.

examples.title: Data Minimization Implementation
examples.description: Python function demonstrating data minimization principle by processing only necessary data fields
examples.explanation: This code shows how to implement data minimization by accepting only required fields and avoiding unnecessary data collection.

examples.title: Human-in-the-Loop Decision Framework
examples.description: Pseudocode for implementing human oversight in AI decision-making for high-stakes scenarios
examples.explanation: This algorithm ensures human review for AI decisions exceeding certain confidence thresholds, maintaining human accountability.

examples.title: Fairness Metric Calculator
examples.description: Java code demonstrating calculation of disparate impact ratio for fairness assessment
examples.explanation: This Java class calculates disparate impact ratio to measure whether AI decisions disproportionately affect protected groups.
